topology_op_labels: Pump A — Substrate and photocatalyst co-dissolved in degassed EtOH/pH 9 buffer (5:1). Photocatalyst must be with substrate for SET oxidation.
Pump B — Michael acceptor in degassed EtOH/pH 9 buffer (5:1). Separate stream to control stoichiometry precisely via flow rate ratio and allow inline mixing.
PhotoCoil — Giese radical addition (C–C bond formation)

MFC C — Gas injection of compressed air via mass flow controller or syringe pump to create segmented gas-liquid (Taylor) flow. O₂ is the terminal oxidant and singlet oxygen precursor. Segmented flow maximizes gas-liquid interfacial area.
